overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character exploring a gothic castle dormitory and corridors. The character moves from a firelit common room with four-poster beds through stairwells and long hallways illuminated by candles and wall sconces, showcasing detailed stone architecture and warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory common room with fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory room examining the lit fireplace and wooden furniture

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning logs providing warm orange light
wooden four-poster bed with green curtains and canopy
high vaulted stone ceiling with gothic arch architecture
ornate patterned carpet covering the stone floor
upholstered wooden chair near the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy gothic dormitory room illuminated by a central fireplace. The space features four-poster beds with green curtains, ornate rugs, and wooden furniture arranged around the warm firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of dormitory near seating area

events.description: character stops walking and looks straight up at the stained glass ceiling window

agents.ego_description: moving toward the back of the room and looking up at the ornate stained glass dome above

entered.detail: large circular stained glass window in the ceiling with red and blue patterns
upholstered sofa against the back wall
wooden stand with multiple tiers holding pastries or items

segments.scene_description: The character moves to the back of the dormitory, passing a tiered serving stand and sofa. At the end of the segment, the character looks up to admire a large stained glass dome in the ceiling while the fireplace glows in the background.

events.description: character opens and passes through wooden door from dormitory into stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the doorway and exiting the dormitory room into a narrow stone corridor

entered.detail: arched stone doorway with heavy wooden door
dark wooden door with iron handle and glass panels
sweeping stone staircase visible through the doorway
wooden wash basin stand with mirror and pitcher

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory through a wooden door, entering a narrow stone corridor. A wash stand with mirror is visible to the right as the character approaches the grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with staircase and portraits

events.description: character begins descending the grand staircase into the lower hall

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand staircase and through a large hall with portraits and statues

entered.detail: tall brass lamp posts with multiple glowing orbs
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
green upholstered sofa against the wall
tall standing candelabra with multiple lit candles
large stone sculpture on pedestal in the hall center

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand staircase into a large hall featuring ornate lamp posts, wall portraits, and a central statue. The space is lit by candles and lamp light, with velvet seating along the walls.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor with arched ceilings and wall sconces

entered.detail: long hallway with high vaulted stone ceiling and repeating arches
wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm light
tall arched stained glass windows with green frames
ornate stone balustrades along the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, narrow corridor with vaulted ceilings and green-trimmed stained glass windows. Wall sconces cast warm light on the stone walls and floor as the character walks toward the distant archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate warmth of a gothic dormitory into the expansive, candlelit corridors of a grand castle. It begins within a cozy room illuminated by a central fireplace, moving past four-poster beds with green curtains and ornate rugs before tilting upward to admire a large stained glass dome in the ceiling. The camera then exits through a wooden door into a narrow stone corridor, passing a wash stand as it approaches and descends a grand staircase. This transition opens the scene into a large hall filled with ornate lamp posts, wall portraits, and a central statue, before shifting once more into a long, vaulted corridor. The movement finally carries the character past green-trimmed stained glass windows and glowing wall sconces toward a distant stone archway.
